name: code-trace
description: ⚡ Copy code snippets bundled with their file paths and line numbers for easy sharing.
author: Anas Shakil

enumDescriptions: Copy each non-empty selection as a separate line, sorted ascending.
Copy a single range spanning the min start to the max end of all selections.
codeTrace.multiSelection.description: How to handle multiple cursors/selections when copying a code reference.

enumDescriptions: Read the clipboard automatically and populate results when the picker opens.
Open an empty picker and parse references as you paste/type.
codeTrace.openSource.description: Where Open Code Reference gets its input from.

enumDescriptions: Collapse multiple ranges of the same file into one result that selects all ranges (multi-cursor).
Show the collapsed multi-cursor result and the individual range results.
Show every reference as its own result row.
codeTrace.openGrouping.description: How to group multiple references that point to the same file.

enumDescriptions: Silently drop lines that are not valid references.
Also show unrecognized lines as disabled rows.
codeTrace.openParsing.description: How to handle input lines that don't match the path:line format.

enumDescriptions: Preview the file and reveal the row as you navigate results in the picker.
Do nothing until you accept a result.
codeTrace.openRowAction.description: What happens when a result row becomes active in the Open Code Reference picker.

enumDescriptions: Parse the input when it looks like references, otherwise fuzzy-filter existing results.
Fuzzy-filter in Auto source; parse on change in Paste source.
Always parse the input box into results on every change.
codeTrace.openBoxBehavior.description: What typing in the picker input box does to the results.
